blended.narrative: Meadowlark is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,724 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 22".
